title: Die Of Death
description: Some Die Of Death stuffs from Roblox to Minecraft
body:
# This Mod brings the Roblox game "Die of Death" to Minecraft.

**In Roblox, Die of Death is an asymmetrical retro-style horror game created by Saucefy10 to mock the current asymmetrical horror-type game genre, with inspiration from Forsaken and other similar games.**

[Play the original Die of Death game on Roblox here!](https://www.roblox.com/games/71895508397153/Die-of-Death)

# **I DON'T OWN ANY OF THE SOUNDTRACKS OR SFX IN THIS MOD. ALL OF THEM WERE TAKEN FROM THE [DOD COMMUNITY WIKI](https://die-of-death.fandom.com/wiki/Die_of_Death_Wiki)**

### What does this mod add to Minecraft?

* Decorative blocks
* Survival and utility items
* Combat items
* An apex predator, a sentient computer virus, a magician and a construct originating from a different Dimension (for now)

**Please Note:** Some items and blocks in this mod are not directly based on Die of Death; many of them can also be obtained in Survival mode.

The mod is currently in active development. While not all features are implemented yet, feel free to explore the content added so far!

Current roadmap (NOT FINAL, THINGS MIGHT CHANGE!)
~~1.13.0 all badware skins added,~~ ~~1.14.0 artful added,~~ ~~1.14.1 Major bug fixes for Artful,~~ ~~1.15.0 all artful skins added,~~ ~~1.16.0 harken added,~~ 1.17.0 all harken skins added, 1.18.0 killdroid added, 1.19.0 all killdroid skins added, 1.20.0 all maps added along with entity spawning (maps are gonna be biomes in a custom dimension), 1.21.0 Harken's dimension added.

I also released my mod on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/die-of-death)! Check it out!
